title: Infosys Receives UAE VAT Penalty of AED 45,476.73
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates, regarding a penalty of AED 45,476.73 for failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26. The company stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: The Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates, imposed a total penalty of AED 45,476.73/- on Infosys.
The penalty was on account of failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.authority_or_counterparty: Federal Tax Authority, United Arab Emirates
litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty on account of failure to pay VAT liability for Q1FY26.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the amount of the penalty.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the company's stated impact assessment.

search_keywords: Federal Tax Authority United Arab Emirates
sample_questions: What UAE VAT penalty did Infosys disclose for Q1FY26?
Did Infosys say the UAE tax penalty had a material impact on its financials or operations?
